scripts.test:backend: npm --workspace backend run test:unit && npm --workspace backend run test:integration
scripts.test:zenit-cash: npm --workspace apps/zenit-cash run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/zenit-cash run test
scripts.verify: npm run test:backend && npm run test:zenit-cash
scripts.build:docs: npm run build:docs:public && npm run build:docs:internal
